---
title: "Projects"
---

::: {.project-card}
### Market Sentiment & Brand Perception Analysis
[UCSD · January 2026]{.date-range}

Analyzed Twitter and digital news sentiment to evaluate shifts in brand perception and consumer response. Found that trend-driven brands experienced faster and stronger short-term sentiment changes compared to established brands.

[Python]{.tag} [NLP]{.tag} [Sentiment Analysis]{.tag} [Twitter API]{.tag}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Up-Sell Ad Campaign for Intuit QuickBooks
[UCSD · December 2025]{.date-range}

Deployed an ML model to analyze clickstream data of 1 million users, identifying causal relationships between features and customer engagement. Informed a second-wave campaign that generated $380K in profit.

[Machine Learning]{.tag} [Python]{.tag} [Causal Inference]{.tag} [Clickstream Data]{.tag}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### GTM Revenue Dashboards — NuSummit Technologies
[2023 – 2025]{.date-range}

Designed and automated GTM & revenue dashboards for enterprise clients in financial services and insurance. Built forecasting and pipeline models using Salesforce data, improving campaign ROI by 20% and conversion rates by 12%.

[SQL]{.tag} [Snowflake]{.tag} [Tableau]{.tag} [AWS]{.tag} [Salesforce]{.tag}
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Multi-Touch Attribution Framework — BIA
[2021 – 2023]{.date-range}

Developed a Multi-Touch Attribution framework to determine ROAS and guide channel-level spend decisions. Optimized SQL queries reducing dashboard latency by 70%.

[SQL]{.tag} [Snowflake]{.tag} [HubSpot]{.tag} [A/B Testing]{.tag}
:::
